mapper.select: SELECT pm.id, pm.from_id, pm.to_id, pm.content, pm.msg_type, pm.voice_url, pm.is_read, pm.create_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar FROM private_message pm LEFT JOIN user u ON pm.from_id = u.id WHERE (pm.from_id = #{userId1} AND pm.to_id = #{userId2}) OR (pm.from_id = #{userId2} AND pm.to_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY pm.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_message (from_id, to_id, content, msg_type, voice_url) VALUES (#{fromId}, #{toId}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{voiceUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE private_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE from_id = #{fromId} AND to_id = #{toId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message WHERE from_id = #{fromId} AND to_id = #{toId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT pm.id, pm.from_id, pm.to_id, pm.content, pm.msg_type, pm.voice_url, pm.is_read, pm.create_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar FROM private_message pm LEFT JOIN user u ON pm.from_id = u.id WHERE (pm.from_id = #{userId1} AND pm.to_id = #{userId2}) OR (pm.from_id = #{userId2} AND pm.to_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY pm.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
